characters.name: Amano Ginji
characters.description: —Ginji to Quilong 天野銀次 Amano Ginji Despite Ginji's dark past, his demeanor is one of an unassuming, energetic, and friendly boy with a strong sense of justice. He makes friends easily, often without trying - and is trusting and open to an almost naive extent. But when exposed to remnants of his past, he has a tendency to revert to his darker "Lightning Emperor" persona. Still, Ginji, despite being the (former) leader of the Mugenjo area is shown having no sense of direction: being able to get lost even in the territory he was supposed to command once. For comical purposes, he also turns droopy and super deformed, most likely designed after a tare panda. He's frequently beaten up by Ban (comically) for doing stupid things.

characters.name: Angela
characters.description: "You're wrong, daddy...there is always happiness shining in the hearts of those who seek it."- Angela to Lucifer Angelais the daugherLuciferwho has been sacrificed for the Divine Design. Glimpse of Lucifer's daughter

characters.name: Beltline Monster
characters.description: The Beltline Monsters are fictional beings within the GetBackers manga. They are immortal, soulless beings that hail from the Beltline, with each one of them possessing monstrous strength. They are feared throughout the manga, and known to be extremely formidable foes.  The Beltline, the most dangerous area of the Limitless Fortress, is ruled by Der Kaiser a mysterious man and Ban's father. The citizens of the Beltline are said to be immortal and imperishable, and they 'will rise back from the dead every time they are attacked'. Every single person from the Beltline has a hideous death-like appearance and a frightening strength.

characters.name: Chun Longhua
characters.description: Chun Longhuais a little girl from Infinity Fortress and the sister of Qinglong. She is a friend of Ginji. Quilong calls his sister and trying to run away from the enemies. Longhua protected his brother from being hit by the monsters of Beltline. When Ginji found her, she was dying in his arms. That's were the Lightning Emperor was born. Long

characters.name: Chun Qinglong
characters.description: Chun Qinglongwas the brother ofChun Longhua. He was living in Infinity Fortress. Ginji first encountered him fishing in the falls which might be part of the cards territory. Ginji joins him and had a conversation with him. Later, Ginji knew that he's from Infinity Fortress and he's the brother of Longhua, the friend of Ginji who dies before he became the Lightning Emperor.

characters.name: Gensui Radou
characters.description: Gen with his granddaughter Ren Gensui Radou or Genis a pharmacist and the architecture ofInfinity Fortressand it's towerBabylon City. He's the one who found and raisedMakubeX. Gen is just an old man running a small pharmacy in the Infinity Fortress with his granddaughter. He found and raised MakubeX and taught him mathematics and computers. He is the architecture of Infinity Fortress and its tower, Babylon City. Gen was dealing with his guilt for helping create such a monster by assisting those (such as Kazuki and the GetBackers) who wish to unlock Infinity Fortress' secrets and open it up to the world.

characters.name: Gouzou Maguruma
characters.description: Gousou Magurumaworks as a transporter. Works mostly together with Kudo Himiko (aka Lady Poison) and Kuroudou Akabane (aka Dr. Jackal). He drives a truck and he goes by the name "Mr. No Brakes". Try to figure out why ;) But he dosen't always walk as a transporter but also as a taxi driver.

characters.name: Haruki Emishi
characters.description: Emishi Haruki Emishi(笑師春樹Emishi Haruki) is one of the followers ofVOLTSinInfinity Fortress. He was known as the "Fresh Blood Joker" (Senketsu no Joker) because he would always laugh as the blood of his enemies was shed, always killing with a smile. His skills in combat mean that he is often covered in the blood of his enemies after battles. In fact,Shido Fuyukionce commented that if his will becomes stronger, his might would be on par with the 4 Kings of VOLTS.

characters.name: Haruki Emishi

characters.name: Hera
characters.description: HeraorHela is the lady who hired the Miroku sibilings and Dr. Jackal to protect the arms of Venus de Milo. She's half French and met Kaito at college. Attracted by his talent, she soon become his lover and they lived together for two years. She never stopped loving him and was able to reunite with him eight years later thanks to the Get Backers.

characters.name: Hevn
characters.description: Ms.Heaven Female 21 First of all, the name "Hevn" is merely a codename for this buxom and enterprising young woman who is at times an ally to the Get Backers - and sometimes at odds with them. Hevn is a "chuukaiya" (仲介屋) or negotiator, a person who mediates jobs between high-paying clients and retrievers (such as the Getbackers or Shido Fuyuki). She hangs out at the Honky Tonk cafe, and shares a good working relationship with Paul Wan, its owner. She's also fond of Ginji Amano, like most characters in the series. Similarly, like many of these characters, she dislikes his partner, Ban Mido. Due to her status as a non-combatant, she's a little afraid of getting into fights. However, in the Divine Design arc, she was used effectively by Maria Noches to interfere with Lucifer's plans.

characters.description: Horii in the anime Horiiwas a character in I.L. arc who made a short appearance in Anime and Manga. In both anime and manga, he killedShuthat made Ginji mad and tries to kill him. However, Ginji fainted. He laughed and said he will kill the Lightning Emperor for his self.

characters.name: Kaito
characters.description: KaitoorKite/Kait(in English dub) is a painter who lives in Shinjuku and he's friends with Ginji Amano and Ban Mido who used to visit Honky Tonk back then. He is the lover ofHeraand he believes that he'll create the most beautiful goddess that will surpass Venus de Milo. Believing Hera is the beautiful goddess in his eyes. However, he got obsessed with the Venus de Milo. And he realizes that he can't beat the statues beauty. He later abandoned Hera. (Soon)

characters.name: Kazuki Fuuchouin
characters.description: 風鳥院花月 Fūchōin Kazuki Kazuki of the StringsPrince of Terror Kazuki is the scion of the noble Fuuchouin family, and his fighting abilities derive from the family school, which emphasizes grace (麗). He is graceful and charming and is often mistaken for a woman. Kazuki appears feminine due to his training as the Fuuchouin's scion because their technique emphasizes speed and grace. But when angered, his fury is such that his notorious other title is "Prince of Fear". Sometimes Ban mocks Kazuki for his feminine appearance. It does not help that he sometimes does wear women's clothes in his line of job as an information-seeker, as is shown when he coerces information about the Hall of Hell out of an Ura follower in a bar. Kazuki is also often depicted as a naive person in terms of his relationships. He trusted his friends even after they betrayed him, leading to him being taken advantages by the likes of Saizou Toufuuin and Toshiki Uryuu. However, it is also his unerring trust that keeps his friends and followers to flock to him. Due to his job as an annaiya or information seeker, Kazuki knows a lot of things concerning theInfinity Fortress. His origins as the heir to a famous and ancient martial arts' school provides him with the privilege of knowing the truth about the estrangement between the Miroku clan and Mido Ban, as was shown during the Hot Spring Rest chapters. Kazuki is also knowledgeable about religions, history and cults.
